name: product-strategy-team
description: Product strategy team with requirement analyst, user researcher, competitive analyst, data analyst, and roadmap planner working together on product management workflows

displayDescription.en: A team of 5 product specialists led by a Product Director: Requirement Analyst (PRD/feature spec writing), User Researcher (research synthesis), Competitive Analyst (competitive intelligence), Data Analyst (metrics tracking), and Roadmap Planner (roadmap management/sprint planning). Covers the full product lifecycle from ideation to launch.
displayDescription.zh: 由产品总监领导的 5 人产品专家团队：需求分析师（PRD/功能规格书）、用户研究员（调研综合分析）、竞品分析师（竞争情报）、数据分析师（指标追踪）和路线图规划师（路线图管理/迭代规划）。覆盖从构思到上线的完整产品生命周期。

defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me write a feature spec / Do a competitive analysis / Plan our product roadmap
defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我写一份功能规格书 / 做一次竞品分析 / 规划产品路线图
